title: Foho Corkscrew Wine Bottle Opener with Bottle Stopper, Waiters Multifunctional Metal Wing Corkscrew for Wine Beer Cap Bottles Opener Remover
features: HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL - This easy to wash Wing Corkscrew and Wine Bottle Opener is constructed from zinc alloy body and stainless steel corkscrew for strength and flexibility with soft touch panels for comfort and easy grip.
EASY TO USE - The designer Wing style of this corkscrew, makes it easy to grip the unfolding wings while drilling and allows for effective pulling while removing the cork.

EXTRA VALUE - The Foho corkscrew adds additional value as it comes with a delightful chrome plated bottle stopper. Use your bottle stopper to extend your wines life, lock in great taste and prevent any unnecessary spillage!

Multiple use & A Good Gift - Ideal for any restaurant, bar, or home for a romantic evening or just a casual drink. Buy a solid heavy duty and built to last wine corkscrew as a great hostess gift for your families or good friends.

Friendly Customer Service - We have a commitment to every buyer 100% user satisfaction, so if you have any problem about our Foho Wing Corkscrew Wine bottle opener, just contact us, we will try best to solve your problem. DON'T WORRY!
description: Product Description FOHO Wing Corkscrew Bottle Opener with Wine Stopper FOHO Best Wing Corkscrew Wine Bottle Opener is made of zinc alloy and comes with a stainless steel wine stopper. Change your traditional way from pulling out the cork to press out the cork. We’ve designed our opener to leave smiles in its wake with a screw that quickly pierces any cork and ergonomic handles that make the process a comfy affair. This dual-purpose bottle opener is brilliantly designed making it ideal for smoothly opening both wine and beer bottles. The compact size is easy to carry, it can be used for party, picnic, date or home dinner. Ideal for any restaurant, bar or home for a romantic evening or just a casual drink. Compact Size Compact Size, conveniently put in a drawer or take it away wherever you want. Enjoy the wine anytime and anywhere you like. Ergonomic Handle Design It is comfortable to grasp and allowing you to remove the cork easily and quickly. Strong Silicone Hand Press Upgraded version of silicone hand press makes it easier to open the bottle. It is not easy to break, more durable. Solid Zinc Alloy Drill Glide through corks without damage or crumbling with a triple-treated non-stick spiral.
